items.title: Microsoft Teams: One-time email passcodes for external presenters in Teams events

items.ai_summary: Private channels in Teams will transition to using a shared mailbox, increasing member limits and applying compliance policies. This affects Teams administrators and users managing private channels.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot uses enterprise assets hosted on Adobe Experience Manager when creating presentations
items.ai_summary: M365 Copilot can create presentations using images from an organization's asset library hosted on Adobe Experience Manager. This change impacts users who connect their asset library to Copilot.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot uses enterprise assets hosted on Adobe Experience Manager when creating presentations
items.ai_summary: M365 Copilot can create presentations using images from an organization's asset library hosted on Adobe Experience Manager. This change impacts users who connect their asset library to Copilot.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot can edit your document in PowerPoint
items.ai_summary: Copilot in PowerPoint will enable users to create and edit presentations through natural conversation, available to Copilot Chat users. This allows for easier content generation and design refinement.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot can edit your document in PowerPoint
items.ai_summary: Copilot in PowerPoint will enable users to create and edit presentations through natural conversation, available to Copilot Chat users. This allows for easier content generation and design refinement.

items.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Security Investigations – AI analysis enhancements
items.ai_summary: Data Security Investigations in Microsoft Purview enhances AI analysis tools for faster categorization and data preparation. This change affects security teams conducting investigations.

items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams now includes user-reported security signals in the admin center. Admins can view and analyze these reports to improve security policies.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Streamlined Microsoft 365 Certified App Management in Teams Admin Center
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will streamline the management of Microsoft 365 certified apps through the Teams Admin Center, allowing admins to enable verified third-party applications. This change affects Microsoft 365 administrators.

items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will improve interpreter quality and now support Traditional Chinese, enhancing real-time interpretation accuracy and consistency for meetings. This change benefits users who require interpretation services.

items.title: Outlook: Add support for Recommended Labels in Outlook mobile

items.title: Outlook: Add support for Recommended Labels in Outlook mobile
items.ai_summary: Outlook mobile will support recommended sensitivity labels when composing emails, applying them automatically if policies are enabled. This feature helps users manage sensitive information more effectively.

items.ai_summary: Microsoft Purview Compliance Portal will enforce Data Loss Prevention (DLP) protections on unsaved sensitive content, preventing it from being printed or moved. This affects users handling sensitive data.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Attendee capacity packs for Teams events

items.title: Microsoft 365 Copilot: Initiate Copilot Chat by sharing files to the Microsoft 365 Copilot app on iPhone and iPad
items.ai_summary: Users on iPhone and iPad can share Word, Excel, or PowerPoint files to the Microsoft 365 Copilot app, allowing them to preview files or chat about them. This affects users sharing files from third-party apps.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Updates to OneDrive file browsing experience in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app on iPad and iPhone
items.ai_summary: Users of the Microsoft 365 Copilot app on iPad and iPhone will be directed to the OneDrive app for advanced file management tasks. This change affects Copilot app users on these devices.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Preview and chat with Microsoft Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app on iPhone
items.ai_summary: The Microsoft 365 Copilot app on iPhone will allow users to preview Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files and interact with Copilot Chat directly within the preview. This affects users accessing these file types on iPhone.

items.title: OneDrive: Transfer ownership of departing employees’ files with ease
items.ai_summary: OneDrive will simplify the transfer of files from departing employees, with improved account cleanup emails and bulk transfer features. This change impacts managers handling offboarding processes.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: App Deployment in Teams Admin Center
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will have a new admin setting for app deployment, allowing more control over which apps are pre-installed for users and groups. This affects Teams administrators.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Customize the screen in Teams Town halls through ‘Manage what attendees see’ [Teams Premium]
items.ai_summary: Teams Premium users can now customize attendee views in Town Hall meetings with enhanced layout options and themes. This feature is aimed at event organizers using Teams Premium.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Raise hands in Town Hall
items.ai_summary: Teams Town Halls will now allow attendees to raise their hands, similar to standard meetings, enhancing interaction. This feature is available for Town Halls organized by Teams Premium users.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Noise Suppression for Dial-In Participants in Teams Audio Conferences
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will introduce noise suppression for dial-in participants, filtering background noise during audio conferences. This change affects all users joining meetings via phone.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Simplified device settings for voice and face recognition on Teams Rooms on Android
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams simplifies device settings for voice and face recognition in Teams Rooms on Android, making it easier for admins to configure these features. This change impacts Teams Rooms administrators.

items.title: Outlook: Calendar support for copying, cutting, and pasting events and appointments
items.ai_summary: Outlook now supports copying, cutting, and pasting calendar events using keyboard shortcuts. This feature is available in the new Outlook for Windows and affects calendar users.

items.title: Outlook: Automatic Draft Minimize
items.ai_summary: Outlook will now minimize drafts instead of closing them when users exit. This feature allows users to quickly access minimized drafts from the message list.

items.title: Outlook: Immersive Search
items.ai_summary: Outlook introduces Immersive Search, providing a Copilot-generated summary of search results in the side pane. This feature impacts users who perform searches in Outlook.

items.title: Outlook: Account Switcher for Copilot Tab
items.ai_summary: Outlook adds an account switcher feature for the Copilot tab, enabling users to easily switch between accounts. This change affects users of Outlook with multiple accounts.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Realtime voice interactions in Word and PowerPoint
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Copilot in Word and PowerPoint now supports real-time voice interactions, allowing users to engage with content using voice commands. This impacts users of Word and PowerPoint.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Channel Agent
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams introduces a Channel Agent that assists teams with project management tasks like creating reports and scheduling meetings. This feature is designed for all Teams users to enhance collaboration.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Learning - Notification Settings
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Viva allows admins to manage all learning-related notifications from a single settings page. This change affects administrators overseeing Viva Learning.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Preview changes before sending content live in 'Manage what attendees see'
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams enhances the 'Manage what attendees see' feature, allowing organizers to preview changes before displaying them to attendees.

items.title: Outlook: Chat for Outlook iOS and Android
items.ai_summary: Outlook introduces a new Copilot Chat overlay for mobile, enabling users to interact with Copilot while managing emails and calendars.

items.title: Outlook: Grid keyboard navigation in calendar month view via arrow keys in new Outlook for Windows and Web
items.ai_summary: In the new Outlook for Windows and Web, users can navigate the calendar month view using arrow keys for easier scheduling.

items.title: Outlook: Read-only access to contacts within a PST file in new Outlook for Windows
items.ai_summary: The new Outlook for Windows will allow users to browse and read contacts within a PST file, with future updates planned for expanded support.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Show more results in Copilot Chat
items.ai_summary: Copilot Chat in Microsoft 365 will allow users to request more search results during conversations, maintaining context and accuracy.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Enhanced personalization with memory in Copilot
items.ai_summary: Microsoft 365 Copilot will enhance its memory feature, improving response relevance based on past communications, which is private to users.

items.title: Microsoft Clipchamp: Updated Clipchamp video start page
items.ai_summary: Clipchamp has a new start page that serves as a unified hub for video creation, discovery, and consumption.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Decorate your background for GCC and GCC High environments (Premium)
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams introduces a background decoration feature for GCC and GCC High environments, requiring a Teams Premium license.

items.title: Outlook: Save an Event as a Draft on Android
items.ai_summary: Outlook on Android enables users to save meeting events as drafts, allowing them to finalize invites later.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Pulse - New Pulse customization options
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Viva Pulse will offer new survey customization options, allowing authors to gather feedback without predefined audiences and collect identified responses. This update affects users creating and managing surveys in Viva Pulse.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Select camera in pre-join and during meeting
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams now allows users to select their camera before joining or during meetings, enhancing user control over video settings.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Support for PowerPoint live within Cloud Video Interop (CVI)
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will support displaying still images during PowerPoint live presentations through Cloud Video Interop, enhancing presentation capabilities. This change affects Teams users presenting with PowerPoint.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Referenced sources are cited in drafted content
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Copilot will now include citations for referenced sources in drafted content, ensuring proper attribution. This change impacts users creating content with Copilot.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Referenced sources are cited in drafted content
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Copilot will now include citations for referenced sources in drafted content, ensuring proper attribution. This change impacts users creating content with Copilot.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: SQL-like commands in the search bar
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will introduce SQL-like commands in the search bar to help users filter messages and files more efficiently. This change affects all Teams users looking to refine their searches.

items.title: Outlook: Contact Improvements on Outlook Mobile
items.ai_summary: Outlook mobile will enhance the contacts experience by displaying more profile information and hiding duplicate contacts. This update affects mobile Outlook users.

items.title: Outlook: Create a meeting from an email thread with Copilot
items.ai_summary: Outlook will allow users to schedule meetings directly from email threads using Copilot, which will generate meeting invitations automatically. This feature affects users who manage meetings via Outlook.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Referenced sources are cited in drafted content
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Copilot will now include citations for referenced sources in drafted content, ensuring proper attribution. This change impacts users creating content with Copilot.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Usability and privacy improvements for live captions and live transcript in meetings
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will improve live captions and transcripts by making them scrollable and disabling copying by default for privacy. This update affects all Teams users participating in meetings.

items.title: Outlook: Add custom sounds for Mail Notifications, Reactions, and Calendar Reminders
items.ai_summary: Outlook will allow users to add custom sounds for mail notifications, reactions, and calendar reminders. This feature affects all Outlook users on Windows.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Insider Risk Management - Policy tuning analysis for priority content-only policies
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Purview compliance portal will enhance insider risk management by providing real-time predictions for users matching policy conditions related to priority content. This change affects compliance admins managing insider risk policies.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Speaker attribution now  “On” by default in BYOD rooms with enhanced admin controls
items.ai_summary: A new PowerShell setting in Teams allows admins to enable speaker attribution by default in BYOD meeting rooms, improving clarity in meetings. This affects IT admins managing Teams settings.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Presenter joins Townhalls via dial-in
items.ai_summary: Presenters can now join town halls via a PSTN code, allowing them to participate as attendees before being promoted to presenter. This change affects town hall organizers and presenters in Teams.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: AI assistant for admins in the Pro Management portal
items.ai_summary: An AI assistant in the Teams Pro Management portal will help IT admins with questions about meeting spaces and management solutions. This feature is specifically for Teams Rooms Pro users.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Configurable Keyboard Shortcuts
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will allow users to configure their own keyboard shortcuts for frequently used actions, enhancing usability. This feature affects all Teams users.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Unified attachment flow on Teams Mobile
items.ai_summary: Teams Mobile introduces a unified attachment flow, allowing users to easily attach files or media from various sources. This affects all Teams mobile users.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Set New Ringtones in Teams Mobile
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams mobile will allow users to set custom ringtones for different types of calls, improving alert management. This change affects all Teams mobile users.

items.title: Outlook: Create, Delete, Rename, and Move Folders
items.ai_summary: Outlook on mobile now allows users to create, delete, rename, and move folders easily from the inbox. This change affects all mobile Outlook users.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Copilot summary for transferred calls
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will enable users to use Copilot to summarize context for transferred calls, helping the receiving colleague understand prior discussions. This feature affects Teams users involved in call transfers.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Support for summarization of very long documents
items.ai_summary: Copilot in Word can now summarize very long documents, up to 1,500,000 words. This feature is useful for users working with extensive documents.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: External group chat policy enforcements for max two orgs
items.ai_summary: Teams will enforce policies for external group chats, limiting members to a maximum of two organizations. Tenant admins can control these policies, affecting users in external chats.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Town hall usage reports in TAC will have all the relevant usage data related to town hall events in the tenant.
items.ai_summary: Town hall usage reports in the TAC will now include all relevant data for events, providing IT admins with comprehensive insights. This change affects IT administrators managing town hall events.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Fix all spelling and grammar issues with Copilot
items.ai_summary: Microsoft 365 Copilot will offer a one-click solution to fix spelling and grammar errors in documents. This feature impacts users of Microsoft 365 applications.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Users can view app ratings before installing apps or agents
items.ai_summary: Users can view app ratings before installing apps or agents in Teams through a new preview card in shared links. This feature affects all Teams users.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: App ratings will be available in the unfurled links
items.ai_summary: App ratings will now be displayed on unfurled links for shared apps in Teams, helping users evaluate apps before installation. This change impacts all Teams users.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Standard and Basic licensed Teams rooms on Windows in the Pro Management portal
items.ai_summary: The Teams Rooms Pro Management portal will now support license management for Standard and Basic licensed devices, providing IT admins with a unified management experience. This affects IT administrators managing Teams Rooms.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Ability to Stop Copilot while it is generating a response
items.ai_summary: Teams will introduce a 'stop' button for Copilot, enabling users to halt response generation at any point. This feature impacts users utilizing Copilot in Teams.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: CVI support for Townhall and Webinar presenters
items.ai_summary: Teams will support Cloud Video Interoperability (CVI) for Townhall and Webinar presenters, allowing external video conferencing users to join seamlessly. This affects organizations using different video systems.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Presenter Chat while screensharing
items.ai_summary: Presenters in Teams can now access meeting chat more easily while screensharing through a new entry point in the presenter toolbar. This change benefits presenters during meetings.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Opening Calls in a small window in Teams
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will allow users to open calls in a small window, minimizing disruptions during meetings. This change affects all Teams users.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Open file links preference to extend across M365 apps
items.ai_summary: Teams file open preferences will now extend to other Microsoft 365 apps, ensuring a consistent experience. This affects users of Outlook, Word, Excel, and PowerPoint.

items.title: Outlook: Additional features on the profile card in Outlook Mobile
items.ai_summary: Outlook Mobile will introduce additional features on the profile card, including reachability and hybrid location. This change affects mobile Outlook users.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Teams Button Support on Multiple Connected Peripheral Devices
items.ai_summary: Teams button support has been expanded to work seamlessly across multiple connected peripheral devices. This change affects users with certified Teams devices.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Copilot in Teams meetings responses can be exported to Word and Excel
items.ai_summary: Responses from Copilot in Teams meetings can now be exported to Word or Excel for editing. This feature affects users who utilize Copilot in meetings.

items.title: Outlook: Prioritize my inbox by Copilot
items.ai_summary: Outlook's Copilot feature will now prioritize emails by marking high priority messages and summarizing their importance. This affects Outlook users.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Insider Risk Management - Progressive alert scoring
items.ai_summary: The Microsoft Purview compliance portal will now assess user activities for insider risks more frequently, providing timely alerts to analysts. This impacts compliance analysts.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: User uploaded custom background images for the new VDI solution for Microsoft Teams
items.ai_summary: Users on the new VDI solution for Teams can now upload custom background images for video calls. This change affects users using Teams on VDI.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Together Mode New Flow
items.ai_summary: Together mode in Teams will have a new simplified flow for setting up scenes and assigning seats. This affects users who utilize Together mode during calls.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Customize the location of Teams notifications on web
items.ai_summary: Teams on the web now lets users customize the location of notifications on their screen. This feature impacts all web users of Teams.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Forward messages with app cards
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams now allows users to forward messages that contain app cards in chats and channels. This change affects all Teams users.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Inline preview of files shared
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will allow users to preview files shared in chats and channels without leaving the conversation. This change affects all users sharing and reviewing files.

items.title: SharePoint: Pages - Updated Hero web part with new layout & styles
items.ai_summary: SharePoint will update the hero web part with a new carousel layout and styles for pages, enhancing visual engagement. This affects users creating and managing SharePoint pages.

items.title: Whiteboard: Existing Azure Board Migration
items.ai_summary: Whiteboard will migrate existing boards from Azure storage to OneDrive for Business storage. This affects users who utilize boards in their Azure environment.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Co-organizer updates in Webinars
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will enable co-organizers in webinars to edit details, publish, and cancel events, similar to the main organizer. This change affects webinar co-organizers.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: EDU tenant type selection in policy wizard
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will allow admins to select their institution's tenant type from the policy wizard, which can be changed at any time. This affects IT admins managing policies.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Performance improvements for anonymous users who join meetings in Edge
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will improve performance for anonymous users joining meetings via the Edge browser. This affects anonymous users participating in meetings.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Latest meeting experiences with performance improvements on web for Chrome (for anonymous join only)
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will enhance performance for anonymous users joining meetings through the Chrome browser. This change impacts anonymous users in meetings.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Workflows within File Chiclet
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will enable users to run instant workflows and create new file workflows through the file chiclet overflow menu. This affects users who manage files and workflows.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Cross location Shifts
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will allow frontline workers to access and select shifts from multiple locations, increasing shift availability. This change impacts frontline workers and their managers.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Sensitivity label support for town hall and webinars (Premium)
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will allow event organizers to set sensitivity labels for town halls and webinars, ensuring compliance with event details. This change affects event organizers.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Engage - Topic Subscription notification
items.ai_summary: Users can subscribe to notifications for topics in Viva Engage, receiving alerts for new posts. This feature affects all users engaged with topics in Viva Engage.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Latest meeting experiences with performance improvements on web for Safari and Firefox (for anonymous join only)
items.ai_summary: Teams on the web will have improved meeting experiences for anonymous users on Safari and Firefox. This change affects anonymous users joining meetings through these browsers.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Amplify - Video templates
items.ai_summary: Viva Amplify introduces video templates for creating engaging video content. This feature affects users creating video publications in Viva Amplify.

items.title: Microsoft Defender for Office 365: False positive email release from Quarantine through threat explorer, email summary panel, advanced hunting, and custom detection email entity page take action
items.ai_summary: SecOps can release false positive emails from quarantine directly through various tools without accessing the Quarantine portal. This change impacts security operations teams.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: School Connection –  Providing access to parents via their phone number
items.ai_summary: Parents can access their child's profile in the School Connection app via their phone number in Teams mobile. This change affects parents and guardians using Teams for school engagement.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Microsoft 365 admin centers –  Manage Teams apps that work on Outlook and Microsoft 365 App
items.ai_summary: Admins can now manage Teams apps across Teams, Outlook, and the Microsoft 365 App from a unified interface. This change affects Microsoft 365 and Teams administrators.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Hiding of inactive channels
items.ai_summary: Teams will automatically hide inactive channels to streamline the channels list. This impacts all users who manage or interact with channels in Teams.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: File Image preview in chats and channels
items.ai_summary: Teams will show thumbnail previews of shared documents in chats and channels. This affects all users sharing files in Teams conversations.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Change background while recording on phone
items.ai_summary: Teams users can now change their background while recording videos on their phones. This feature is relevant for anyone using Teams on mobile.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Search in Viva Connections on iOS and Android tablet
items.ai_summary: Viva Connections on iOS and Android tablets will now have a search feature for users. This change affects all users of Viva Connections on these devices.

items.title: Microsoft Purview: Insider Risk Management – Policy Recommendation Panel in IRM
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Purview Insider Risk Management now offers a Policy Recommendation Panel that helps identify missing protections and optimize policy configurations for insider risk. This change affects organizations using Insider Risk Management.

items.title: Outlook: 1-year and 2-year options for email sync window (Offline settings)
items.ai_summary: Outlook for Windows now allows users to choose to save 1 or 2 years of email for offline access, enhancing flexibility for users based on their storage needs. This change affects Outlook users.

items.title: Outlook: Jump to Any Folder Instantly with Go to Folder
items.ai_summary: Outlook introduces a Go to Folder feature that enables users to quickly search and navigate to any mailbox folder by typing part of the folder name. This change affects Outlook users.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Additional meeting results in Copilot responses
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Copilot will now display more than 25 meeting results, improving visibility for users with larger calendars. This change affects users utilizing Copilot for meeting management.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Run SMB admin tasks faster with Microsoft 365 Admin Agent in Microsoft Teams
items.ai_summary: SMB Admins can now use the Microsoft 365 Admin Agent in Teams to perform common admin tasks and get guidance without leaving the Teams interface. This impacts SMB administrators.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Chose Anthropic models when editing with Copilot in Word
items.ai_summary: In Word, users can now choose Anthropic models alongside OpenAI models when using Copilot for editing. This change affects users of Microsoft 365 who utilize Copilot in Word.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Natural language support for Scheduling prompts
items.ai_summary: Microsoft 365 Copilot will support natural language for scheduling prompts, allowing users to schedule events conversationally. This change affects all users utilizing Copilot for scheduling tasks.

items.title: Outlook: Calendar Conditional Formatting in New Outlook
items.ai_summary: Users can apply basic conditional formatting rules to their calendar in the new Outlook, enabling color-coding of events based on various criteria. This affects all users of the new Outlook.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: New sharing panel in meetings - improved content discovery and ease of sharing
items.ai_summary: The sharing panel in Teams meetings will be updated for better content discovery and sharing. This affects all Teams meeting participants.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Copilot Analytics - Onboarding emails for Leaders
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Viva will send automated onboarding emails to Leaders to promote the use of the Copilot Dashboard in Viva Insights.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Web Link as a Reference in Copilot Notebooks
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Copilot will allow users to add web links as references in Copilot Notebooks. This change affects users utilizing Copilot for note-taking.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Teams Phone Call Transfer Improvements
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams is enhancing the call transfer process on desktop, making it quicker and more intuitive with fewer steps and transfer suggestions. This change affects all Teams users making calls.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Improved visibility and control for downloads
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams is updating the download manager to improve tracking of file downloads, allowing users to manage downloads without interrupting chat actions. This change affects all Teams users.

items.title: SharePoint: Admin Center - Data Access Governance - Permission report for a given group
items.ai_summary: SharePoint admins can now generate a report showing all sites a specific group can access and the level of access, helping to manage sensitive content exposure. This change affects SharePoint administrators.

items.title: SharePoint: Admin Center - detailed report on Everyone except external user permissions
items.ai_summary: SharePoint Advanced Management admins will receive a detailed report on permissions for the 'Everyone except external user' and 'Everyone' groups, allowing for better permission oversight. This change affects SharePoint Advanced Management admins.

items.title: Microsoft Purview: Endpoint Data Loss Prevention – Device Health Reporting Dashboard
items.ai_summary: Admins can now use a new dashboard in Microsoft Purview to monitor device health across all devices, ensuring they are ready for policy updates. This change affects IT administrators managing device compliance.

items.title:
Microsoft Teams: AI-powered notes for in-person
meetings with Facilitator in Teams Rooms on Android
items.ai_summary: Teams Rooms on Android will feature an AI-powered Facilitator that captures notes and actions during in-person meetings, streamlining meeting documentation. This change affects users of Teams Rooms Pro.

items.title: Exchange: Dynamic distribution groups now populate membership faster on creation and modification
items.ai_summary: Dynamic distribution groups in Exchange Online will now populate membership more quickly upon creation or modification, reducing wait times significantly. This change affects Exchange Online administrators.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Search in quick sharing experience
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams is enabling search within the quick sharing experience, allowing users to find and attach cloud files more easily. This affects all Teams users sharing files.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Unblock users to send message while file is uploading in the background
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams is introducing asynchronous file uploads, allowing users to send messages while files are uploading in the background. This change improves collaboration for all Teams users sharing large files.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Microsoft Teams: Secure Reliable Transport (SRT) Support for Teams town halls
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will support Secure Reliable Transport (SRT) for streaming in town halls, improving video quality over the internet. This change affects users participating in Teams town halls.

items.title: Outlook: New and Improved People Hub on Web
items.ai_summary: Outlook Web will feature a new People Hub with a modern interface, improved search, and automatic linking of duplicate contacts.

items.title: Microsoft 365 admin center: Organizational Messages now supports Action Segments
items.ai_summary: The Microsoft 365 admin center now allows IT admins to target Organizational Messages using dynamic, pre-defined usage segments. This change enhances message targeting for admins.

items.title: Microsoft 365 admin center: Organizational Messages now supports Email messages
items.ai_summary: Organizational Messages in the Microsoft 365 admin center now supports Email as a delivery channel, expanding communication options for admins. This affects how messages are delivered to users.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Domain exclusion for web grounding
items.ai_summary: Admins can exclude specific websites from web grounding in M365 Copilot and Copilot Chat. This feature impacts IT admins managing Copilot settings.

items.title: Microsoft Purview: DSPM – New Microsoft Purview Data Security Posture Management Experience
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Purview is enhancing Data Security Posture Management (DSPM) to improve data security across traditional and AI environments. This change affects organizations using Purview for data security management.

items.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention – New Guided Experience to Diagnose and Resolve DLP Issues
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Purview is introducing a guided diagnostics experience for Data Loss Prevention (DLP) issues, helping users understand DLP policy actions. This affects Microsoft 365 E5 customers who manage DLP policies.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Quick Share for Images
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams is adding Quick Share for images, allowing users to easily share visual content in chats and channels. This change affects all Teams users sharing images.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot improved long files navigation using document structure, enabling more accurate answers and clearer citations.
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Copilot is improving navigation of long files by utilizing document structure for better answers and citations. This affects users of Microsoft 365 who rely on Copilot for document assistance.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Branded footer in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app
items.ai_summary: The Microsoft 365 Copilot app will introduce a branded footer that displays the organization’s logo and an 'Approved by' label. This change affects administrators managing branding settings.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Dynamic Topics
items.ai_summary: Viva will enhance comment reporting by using Copilot to create customer-specific topics and improve existing comment-to-topic assignments.

items.title: SharePoint: Microsoft 365 Archive in GCC-L
items.ai_summary: Microsoft 365 Archive is now available in GCC-L, allowing organizations to move inactive SharePoint sites to cold storage while maintaining searchability and compliance. This impacts organizations using SharePoint in GCC-L.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Adaptive card-based app & copilot agent link unfurling in Teams
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will allow users to discover and add SharePoint agents directly in chats and channels through an in-context store. This feature enhances collaboration.

items.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Lifecycle Management – Increase in expansion limit for auto expanding archive beyond 1.5TB
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Purview will now allow auto expanding archive mailboxes to exceed the previous 1.5 TB limit, ensuring continuous data retention. This change affects organizations using auto expanding archives.

items.title: SharePoint: File Actions in SharePoint
items.ai_summary: SharePoint will enable AI-driven file actions, allowing users to manage files through chat commands. This feature impacts users who frequently organize and analyze files in SharePoint.

items.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Security Triage Agent in Data Loss Prevention - Reasoning Trace and Confidence Score for agent-triaged alerts
items.ai_summary: The Data Security Triage Agent in Microsoft Purview will now provide confidence scores and reasoning traces for alerts, improving transparency for analysts. This change affects security operations teams using DLP.

items.title: Microsoft Agent 365: Registry sync
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Agent 365 will allow syncing of external AI agents into its registry for better visibility and governance. This feature impacts administrators managing AI agents.

items.title: Planner: Microsoft Planner tab support for shared and private channels in Microsoft Teams
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Planner can now be added as a tab in shared and private channels in Teams, allowing users to manage tasks directly within those channels. This affects Teams users who utilize Planner.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Teams frontline BYOD onboarding wizard
items.ai_summary: Teams will introduce a BYOD onboarding wizard for frontline workers, simplifying the process of using the Teams mobile app on personal devices. This affects frontline workers and IT support.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Meeting participants can request collaborative annotation sessions
items.ai_summary: In Microsoft Teams meetings, participants can request to start collaborative annotation sessions, which require approval from the presenter. Organizers can control who can start annotations through a new Meeting Options setting.

items.title: SharePoint: eSignature for Microsoft 365 - Recipient groups
items.ai_summary: SharePoint eSignature now allows recipient groups, enabling any member to sign on behalf of the group. This affects users utilizing eSignature features.

items.title: Outlook: Multiselect events on calendar surface
items.ai_summary: Outlook now supports multi-selecting calendar events for bulk actions like open, copy-paste, delete, and categorize. This change affects users of the new Outlook for Windows.

items.title: Outlook: Bulk Opening/Closing calendar groups in the left nav
items.ai_summary: Outlook allows users to bulk select or deselect all calendars within a group in the left navigation. This feature is for users of the new Outlook for Windows.

items.title: Outlook: Teammates Calendars in Left Nav in calendar
items.ai_summary: Outlook will now display colleagues' and direct reports' calendars by default in the left navigation. This change impacts users of the new Outlook for Windows.

items.title: OneDrive: Sync Support for up to 1 million items on Windows
items.ai_summary: OneDrive Sync will support syncing up to 1 million items on Windows, enhancing management of large libraries. This affects users on devices meeting the new requirements.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Proactive push notifications for the Microsoft 365 Copilot mobile app
items.ai_summary: The Microsoft 365 Copilot mobile app will send proactive push notifications for productivity workflows. This feature is for users with Microsoft 365 Copilot licenses.

items.title: Microsoft Edge: Work Search Banner for Google
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Edge will show a work search banner for Google searches, linking to organization-specific results. Admins can control this feature via policy settings.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Efficiency Mode
items.ai_summary: Teams will have an efficiency mode that reduces resource usage on low-performance devices, improving meeting quality. This change affects all Teams users on constrained hardware.

items.title: Outlook: Account Selector in Outlook Copilot Side Pane
items.ai_summary: Outlook adds an account selector in the Copilot side pane for users with multiple accounts, simplifying account management. This change affects users with multiple Copilot-enabled accounts.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Entra passwordless resource account support for Teams Rooms on Windows devices
items.ai_summary: Teams Rooms on Windows will support passwordless sign-in using Entra Resource Accounts, with an admin migration wizard available.

items.title: Built‑in AI Interpreter for Calls on Teams Phone Devices

items.title: Microsoft Purview: Insider Risk Management-New Microsoft Fabric lakehouse risk indicators

items.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention-Alert Classification Property for DLP Alerts on Purview Portal
items.ai_summary: DLP alerts can now be classified in the Purview portal, helping security teams manage and report alerts more effectively.

items.ai_summary: DLP alerts will be aggregated by user identity, allowing admins to analyze policy violations more efficiently.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): SharePoint list agent
items.ai_summary: Copilot users can create SharePoint lists easily through prompts, streamlining the process of managing structured information.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Insider Risk Management – Introduction of pay-as-you-go feature usage report

items.ai_summary: Admins can retrieve diagnostic traces from Windows endpoints for data loss prevention investigations through the Purview Portal, improving troubleshooting without user disruption.

items.ai_summary: Users can connect Microsoft 365 Copilot with Asana to manage projects and tasks more effectively.

items.ai_summary: Microsoft Copilot is updating the Chat History filtering interface to make it simpler and easier to clear filters. This change affects users who utilize chat history.

items.ai_summary: Microsoft 365 Copilot will allow users to summarize OneDrive files directly in Windows, enhancing the sharing process. This feature will be available in File Explorer and OneDrive Activity Center.

items.ai_summary: A floating Copilot button will be added to the OneDrive web interface, providing quick access to Copilot features. This will help users perform actions related to their files more efficiently.

items.title: Outlook: New search folder types
items.ai_summary: Outlook is moving search folders to the Settings experience and expanding supported folder types, improving email organization for users. This change affects users of the new Outlook for Windows and web.

items.ai_summary: Customers can connect Microsoft 365 Copilot with Shortcut to manage agile development workflows. This change affects users managing agile workflows with Copilot.

items.ai_summary: SharePoint agents can now be utilized in Teams Channels, similar to their use in Teams Group Chats. This change affects Teams users who engage in channel discussions.

items.ai_summary: Teams panels will now indicate room occupancy using signals from Teams Rooms devices or occupancy sensors. This affects users relying on Teams panels for room availability.

items.title: Outlook: Quick steps in the pop-out ribbon
items.ai_summary: Outlook now integrates Quick Steps into the pop-out ribbon, allowing users to access them while reading emails in separate windows. This change affects all Outlook users on Windows and Web.

items.title: Outlook: Prepare for your meeting on-the-go with Copilot
items.ai_summary: Copilot in Outlook mobile helps users prepare for meetings by summarizing relevant emails, tasks, and previous meeting recaps. This feature is aimed at mobile users.

items.title: SharePoint: OneDrive and SharePoint – Use table of contents in PDF
items.ai_summary: OneDrive and SharePoint now support displaying a table of contents in PDFs, allowing users to jump to specific sections. This affects users accessing PDFs in these platforms.

items.title: Add multiple SharePoint agents in a single Teams conversation
items.ai_summary: Teams users can now add multiple SharePoint agents to a group chat, meeting chat, or channel. This change impacts users collaborating through Teams.

items.title: Outlook: Sync folder order
items.ai_summary: Outlook mobile will now sync folder order to match other Outlook apps, improving consistency for users. This affects all Outlook mobile users.

items.title: Outlook: open attachments while offline in the new Outlook for Windows
items.ai_summary: The new Outlook for Windows will allow users to open and save email attachments while offline, enhancing offline functionality. This change affects all Outlook users on Windows.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Insider Risk Management - Enriching Insider risk management with Communication compliance as an indicator
items.ai_summary: Insider Risk Management in the Microsoft Purview compliance portal will now include communication compliance as an indicator for detecting risks. This affects compliance and risk management roles.

items.title: Outlook: Updated conversation actions on Outlook for Android
items.ai_summary: Outlook for Android will update conversation actions to the bottom of the screen and allow customization of their order. This affects users of the Outlook mobile app.

items.title: Outlook: Choose how many days of emails sync to your device for offline usage
items.ai_summary: Outlook will allow users to select how many days of emails to sync for offline access. This change affects users who need offline email access.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Glint - Export Team Summary report in Viva Glint to editable PowerPoint slides
items.ai_summary: Managers can now export Team Summary reports from Viva Glint to editable PowerPoint slides, improving report accessibility. This affects managers using Viva Glint.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Town halls in DoD
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will introduce town hall capabilities for DoD organizations, allowing large-scale events with up to 20,000 attendees. This change impacts DoD users hosting events.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Communication Compliance - User scoping role-based access control (RBAC)
items.ai_summary: The Microsoft Purview compliance portal will implement role-based access control (RBAC) for user scoping in Communication Compliance. This affects compliance administrators managing user access.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Object Character Recognition (OCR) support for embedded images in Exchange Online and Microsoft Teams
items.ai_summary: OCR support will expand to embedded images in Exchange Online and Microsoft Teams, enhancing text recognition capabilities. This affects users working with documents containing images.

items.title: Outlook: Auto-Export mailbox to PST file in new Outlook for Windows
items.ai_summary: Outlook for Windows will allow users to schedule exports of mailboxes or specific folders to PST files. This change affects users who need to back up their Outlook data.

items.title: Outlook: Export mailbox to PST file in new Outlook for Windows
items.ai_summary: Outlook for Windows will enable users to export entire mailboxes or specific folders to PST files. This update is relevant for users managing their Outlook data.

items.title: Outlook: Choose save location when saving to a cloud account in the Outlook app for iOS and Android
items.ai_summary: The Outlook app for iOS and Android will let users choose the save location when saving documents to cloud accounts. This affects mobile users saving files.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Sensitivity analysis for policy tuning
items.ai_summary: Admins will gain the ability to view a sensitivity analysis in the Microsoft Purview compliance portal to help tune policy thresholds. This impacts compliance administrators.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Remote log collection in Teams admin center​
items.ai_summary: Teams Administrators can now remotely collect client diagnostics logs from users' devices for troubleshooting. This change minimizes user intervention, impacting Teams administrators.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Agents in Copilot Chat available on Edge Sidebar
items.ai_summary: Agents in Copilot Chat will be accessible on the Edge Sidebar, simplifying task management for users. This change affects users utilizing Copilot Chat in Edge.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Microsoft 365 Copilot app for DoD environments
items.ai_summary: The Microsoft 365 app for DoD environments will be updated to include a new UI and quick access to key modules. This change affects users in DoD environments.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Configurate format, style, and duration of Audio Overviews in Copilot Notebooks
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Copilot now allows users to customize the format, style, and duration of Audio Overviews in Notebooks. This change affects users creating audio content in Copilot Notebooks.

items.title: SharePoint: eSignature - globally available
items.ai_summary: SharePoint's eSignature service is now available globally, allowing users to request electronic signatures on Word and PDF documents. This affects users needing to obtain signatures within SharePoint.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Custom font and theme support for Viva Amplify
items.ai_summary: Viva Amplify adds support for custom themes and fonts from Brand Center, helping communicators maintain brand consistency. This change impacts users managing communication campaigns.

items.title: Microsoft 365 admin center: Usage reports - Microsoft 365 Copilot search
items.ai_summary: A new usage report for Microsoft 365 Copilot search will be added to the admin center, providing insights on search queries and usage trends. This affects Microsoft 365 administrators.

items.title: Microsoft 365 Admin Center: Pin agents in M365 Copilot Chat
items.ai_summary: Admins can now pin specific agents in M365 Copilot Chat for all users or selected groups, improving access to relevant resources. This change impacts administrators managing Copilot Chat.

items.title: Whiteboard: Text Sizing Feature
items.ai_summary: Whiteboard introduces a Text Sizing feature, allowing users to adjust font sizes for better readability. This affects users creating content in Whiteboard.

items.title: Whiteboard: Sticky notes accelerator
items.ai_summary: Whiteboard will have a Sticky notes accelerator, enabling users to add sticky notes quickly. This feature enhances collaboration for users working in Whiteboard.

items.title: Microsoft 365 admin center: Usage reports - Copilot Chat - Usage intensity and new app coverage
items.ai_summary: The Microsoft 365 admin center will provide new usage reports for Copilot Chat, including metrics on prompts and user activity across various apps.

items.title: Microsoft 365 Admin Center: Setting to pin M365 Copilot app to Windows taskbar
items.ai_summary: Global and Intune administrators can pin the M365 Copilot app to the Windows taskbar for easier access on managed devices.

items.title: Microsoft 365 admin center: M365 Copilot Billing and usage - Budget limits
items.ai_summary: Admins can set budget limits for Copilot services in the Microsoft 365 admin center, allowing for better cost control through defined policies.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Insights: Copilot Business Impact Report
items.ai_summary: A new Power BI report in Viva Insights will help users analyze the impact of Copilot usage on business KPIs.

items.title: Microsoft 365 admin center: new scenarios enabling in Microsoft 365 Monitoring
items.ai_summary: The Microsoft 365 admin center's Service Health Dashboard now includes enhanced organization-level monitoring for Microsoft Entra. This change affects IT admins managing service health.

items.title: Microsoft Purview Compliance Portal: Microsoft Purview Data Security Posture Management for AI: Additional permissions for AI roles
items.ai_summary: New roles for accessing AI data have been added to Microsoft Purview Data Security Posture Management for AI. This change affects compliance and security admins.

items.title: Microsoft Purview Compliance Portal: Microsoft Purview Data Security Posture Management for AI: Web Search Query
items.ai_summary: AI interactions in Microsoft Purview Data Security Posture Management for AI can now be filtered to show web search queries. This feature is relevant for compliance and security admins.

items.title: Microsoft Purview Compliance Portal: Data Security Posture Management for AI - M365 Copilot view
items.ai_summary: A dedicated page for M365 Copilot protection capabilities and usage is now available in Microsoft Purview Data Security Posture Management for AI. This affects compliance and security admins.

items.title: Microsoft Purview Compliance Portal: Data Loss Prevention to restrict Microsoft 365 Copilot processing on emails with sensitivity labels
items.ai_summary: Data Loss Prevention (DLP) now restricts Microsoft 365 Copilot from processing emails with sensitivity labels, effective for emails from 2025. This change impacts compliance and security admins.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Admins can easily manage orphaned agents with comprehensive lifecycle functionality
items.ai_summary: Admins can now manage the lifecycle of orphaned agents in Microsoft 365 Copilot, including filtering and deleting ownerless agents. This feature is aimed at IT admins.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Information Protection - Scan cold files in SharePoint and OneDrive for sensitive information
items.ai_summary: Admins can now scan cold files in SharePoint and OneDrive for sensitive information and classify or label them. This change affects compliance and security admins.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Department graph for Microsoft Purview Data Security Posture Management for AI
items.ai_summary: A new graph in Microsoft Purview Data Security Posture Management for AI shows departments of users interacting with M365 Copilot. This feature is relevant for compliance and security admins.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Insider Risk Management - Risky AI usage
items.ai_summary: Insider Risk Management will now help identify risky AI usage, including risky prompts and responses in generative AI apps. This update affects compliance and security admins.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal - Data Lifecycle Management - Separation of the Microsoft 365 Copilot retention policy location from Microsoft Teams chats
items.ai_summary: Admins can now manage retention policies for Microsoft 365 Copilot interactions separately from Microsoft Teams chats. This change impacts IT admins managing data lifecycle.

items.title: Microsoft 365 app: Microsoft Places Management portal
items.ai_summary: Places Admins can manage their Places directory data through a new interface, allowing for easier creation and editing of building and room information.

items.title: Microsoft Purview Compliance Portal: Data Compliance to support Generative AI Applications
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Purview Compliance Portal will support generative AI applications with a new pay-as-you-go pricing model for data compliance solutions starting May 1.

items.title: Outlook: Updated work hours and location experience in the new Outlook for Windows and web
items.ai_summary: Outlook will introduce an updated work hours and location feature, allowing users to manage their work location and sync it across Microsoft 365 apps.

items.title: Microsoft Edge: v.140 - HTTPS First Mode
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Edge will implement HTTPS-First Mode, upgrading HTTP connections to HTTPS where possible and warning users about security risks. Admins can control this feature's availability.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): [Copilot Chat] Email attachment summarization (Classic Attachments)
items.ai_summary: Copilot Chat will now summarize email attachments along with the email body, supporting various file types. This affects users of Microsoft 365 Copilot.

items.title: Microsoft Edge: v. 140 - Tab Groups – Auto-Save and Easy Revisit
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Edge will automatically save tab groups for easier access later, with admins able to control this feature's availability. This change affects all Edge users.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Use ContextIQ file suggestions in Copilot Chat
items.ai_summary: Users can now reference files in Copilot Chat by selecting them from the ContextIQ menu instead of uploading. This affects both licensed and unlicensed Copilot Chat users.

items.title: Microsoft 365 Apps: Cloud Update
items.ai_summary: Microsoft 365 Apps will have the Cloud Update feature available for all users, allowing admins to manage monthly updates through automation services.

items.title: Microsoft Edge: v.140 - Auto-discarding Sleeping Tabs
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Edge will automatically discard sleeping tabs to save memory, with management options available through specific policies for admins.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Glint - Self service for bulk custom access
items.ai_summary: Viva Glint Admins can now assign custom access to surveys and areas in bulk using roles, enhancing access management.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Endpoint Data Loss Prevention - Ability to fetch the original file resulting in policy match as evidence (Microsoft Managed storage)
items.ai_summary: Admins can now store a copy of files that trigger Data Loss Prevention policies in Microsoft Managed storage for analysis.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Shared spaces insights in the Pro Management portal
items.ai_summary: The Pro Management portal in Teams will include shared spaces insights, providing IT with usage data for Teams Rooms.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Copilot Support for 1:1 and Group Calls on Teams Phone Devices
items.ai_summary: Copilot will be available during 1:1 and group calls on Teams phone devices, offering intelligent insights and prompts.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Your AI assistant in the DoD environment
items.ai_summary: Microsoft 365 Copilot will be available in the DoD environment, assisting users with drafting, summarizing, and organizing content.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Threads in channels
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will introduce threads in channels, allowing users to have side conversations on specific topics without cluttering the main chat. This change affects all Teams users.

items.title: Microsoft Edge: Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat Summarization in Edge for Business Context Menu
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Edge for Business will add a Copilot Chat summarization option in the context menu, helping users understand their open pages. This affects Edge users.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot Pages in Government Clouds
items.ai_summary: Microsoft 365 Copilot Pages will be available in government clouds, enabling users to edit and share Copilot responses for collaboration. This change affects government users of Microsoft 365.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Pronoun Awareness in Microsoft 365 Copilot
items.ai_summary: Microsoft 365 Copilot will incorporate user profile pronouns in its responses, enhancing personalization for users. This affects all users of Microsoft 365 Copilot.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Data Loss Prevention - Diagnostics in the new portal
items.ai_summary: The Data Loss Prevention diagnostics feature in the Microsoft Purview compliance portal will be rolled back, affecting users who rely on this functionality. This change impacts compliance administrators.

items.title: Microsoft 365: Multi-admin change notifications for Microsoft 365 Backup
items.ai_summary: Microsoft 365 Backup will allow designated admins to receive email notifications for significant changes to backup settings, enhancing oversight. This affects backup administrators.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Filtering Conversation History
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Copilot will introduce chat history filtering, allowing users to customize their view of past conversations. This feature impacts all users utilizing Copilot.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Compact Notification Size
items.ai_summary: Teams users can now adjust the size of notifications to a compact format for a cleaner interface. This change affects all Teams users.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Autoplay videos in Engage (Muted)
items.ai_summary: Viva Engage will support muted autoplay for videos, with admins able to enable or disable this feature. This change affects administrators managing Viva Engage settings.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Monitor DNS resolution failures and impact of proxy on Teams meetings with Best practice configurations dashboard in Teams admin center.
items.ai_summary: Teams administrators can monitor DNS resolution failures and proxy impacts on meeting quality using a new dashboard in the Teams admin center. This update is relevant for Teams admins.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: New audit logs for Give control, Take control, and Screensharing
items.ai_summary: Teams will provide new audit logs for control and screensharing actions, accessible in the Teams Admin Center. This change impacts IT administrators overseeing Teams activities.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: New Microsoft Teams Chat and channels experience in Education
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams introduces a new chat and channels experience for Education, allowing users to organize conversations and access messages more easily. This is an optional feature for educational institutions.

items.title: Microsoft 365 app: Microsoft Places - New options for desk mode configuration
items.ai_summary: The Microsoft 365 app now allows Places administrators to configure desks in various modes, such as Assigned or Bookable, providing flexibility in desk management. This change affects administrators managing workspace configurations.

items.title: Outlook: Jump to a row in the Message List on Outlook on the Web and New Outlook for Windows
items.ai_summary: Outlook on the Web and New Outlook for Windows will allow users to jump to specific rows in the Message List by typing names. This feature improves navigation for all Outlook users.

items.title: SharePoint: OneDrive and SharePoint – Compress your PDF
items.ai_summary: OneDrive for Web now includes a feature to compress PDF files, allowing users to choose from three compression levels. This affects users managing PDF documents in OneDrive.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Specify who has control of production tools in Teams Town hall
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will allow organizers to specify who controls production tools during Town hall events, enhancing event management. This feature is aimed at event organizers using Teams.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Detect sensitive content that's being shared in meetings (Premium)
items.ai_summary: Teams will now detect sensitive content shared during meetings and alert presenters and organizers. This feature enhances security for all Teams users.

items.ai_summary: Teams Rooms on Windows will use facial recognition to identify participants and optimize camera views during meetings, provided organizational policies allow it. This feature is for Teams Rooms Pro users.

items.ai_summary: Teams introduces Moderator-Governed Meetings to ensure compliance during sensitive meetings by requiring a designated moderator. This feature is for organizations needing strict compliance oversight.

items.ai_summary: Teams now offers DVR capabilities for town halls on iOS and Android, allowing attendees to pause and navigate through live events. This feature enhances user experience for all town hall participants.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Expanded and enhanced peripheral support for BYOD spaces
items.ai_summary: Teams expands peripheral support for BYOD spaces, allowing seamless connection of devices and providing IT admins with detailed reports on device usage. This change benefits IT administrators managing device inventories.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: New Teams calendar available to Education customers
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will introduce a new calendar for Education customers, which integrates with Outlook and other Microsoft services. This calendar will be enabled by default but can be turned off by users.

items.title: SharePoint: SharePoint eSignature for Microsoft Word
items.ai_summary: SharePoint will offer eSignature functionality for Microsoft Word, available to tenants who enable it in the Admin Center and have the Current Channel version of Word. This affects users who utilize Word within SharePoint.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Group-less campaigns in Viva Amplify
items.ai_summary: Viva Amplify will allow campaign management without requiring M365 group roles, simplifying the process for SharePoint admins. This change affects how campaigns are created and managed.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: New Microsoft Teams chat and channels experience in GCC High and DoD
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will have a new chat and channels experience in GCC High and DoD, improving organization and accessibility of conversations. This update affects users in these specific government environments.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: New Microsoft Teams chat and channels experience in GCC
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will have a new chat and channels experience in GCC, enhancing the organization of conversations. This update affects users in GCC environments.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Personal meeting templates (Premium)
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will introduce personal meeting templates, allowing users to save meeting configurations for quick scheduling. This feature benefits all Teams users.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Real-Time Text in Teams Meetings and Calls
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Teams will implement Real-Time Text (RTT) for meetings and calls, aiding communication for deaf, hard-of-hearing, and neurodiverse users. This feature enhances accessibility for all users.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Townhall concurrent attendees increase to 100,000

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Meeting organizers can enable transcription in multilingual meetings (Copilot and Teams Premium)
items.ai_summary: Meeting organizers in Microsoft Teams can enable transcription for multilingual meetings, allowing participants to set their own spoken language. This feature is available for those with Copilot or Teams Premium licenses.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Audio summary of your file
items.ai_summary: Microsoft 365 Copilot can now generate audio summaries of files, making it easier for users to consume information on the go.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Third-Party chat and meeting keyboard shortcut support
items.ai_summary: Teams will support keyboard shortcuts familiar to users of third-party chat and meeting applications, enhancing usability.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Real-Time Mic Volume Indicator for Teams Meetings
items.ai_summary: Teams meetings will feature a real-time Mic Volume Indicator, providing users with visual feedback on their audio levels.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: In-meeting Chat, Copilot, and Notes panes can be popped out from the meeting window
items.ai_summary: In Teams meetings, users can pop out and resize the Chat, Copilot, and Notes panes from the main meeting window.

items.title: Microsoft Intune: Application Control for Business

items.title: Microsoft 365 app: Use Copilot in PDFs within the Microsoft 365 Copilot mobile app
items.ai_summary: The Microsoft 365 Copilot mobile app will enable users to use Copilot with PDF files for summaries and insights. This affects users of the Copilot mobile app.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Reference an Excel file when creating a presentation with Copilot for PowerPoint
items.ai_summary: Users can reference an Excel file when creating a presentation with Copilot in PowerPoint. This affects users utilizing Copilot for presentations.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Reference an Excel file when creating a presentation with Copilot for PowerPoint
items.ai_summary: Users can reference an Excel file when creating a presentation with Copilot in PowerPoint. This affects users utilizing Copilot for presentations.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Reference an Excel file when creating a presentation with Copilot for PowerPoint
items.ai_summary: Users can reference an Excel file when creating a presentation with Copilot in PowerPoint. This affects users utilizing Copilot for presentations.

items.ai_summary: Viva Glint will allow Company Admins to enable Copilot for themselves, simplifying access without needing custom roles. This change affects Company Admin users in Viva Glint.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Learning - Learner Record Sync (LRS) logs
items.ai_summary: Viva Learning will provide sync logs in the admin tab to track assignment and completion errors. This update is relevant for administrators managing Viva Learning.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Unified Conversations (Chat History) List
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Copilot will introduce a unified list for conversations, making it easier for users to find and continue chats. This change affects all users of Copilot.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Information Protection - Confidence level filtering in Content Explorer Cmdlet
items.ai_summary: The Content Explorer Cmdlet will now include confidence level filtering for exported results. This change affects compliance and data management teams.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Pulse - Pulse users can assign other users as delegates

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Ground prompts using SharePoint and OneDrive Folders
items.ai_summary: Users can now select SharePoint and OneDrive folders in the 'Attach cloud files' experience to scope prompts in Microsoft Copilot. This affects users utilizing Copilot.

items.title: Microsoft Clipchamp: Transcript-based editing in Clipchamp
items.ai_summary: Clipchamp introduces transcript-based editing, allowing users to remove unwanted sections from videos by selecting text in the transcript. This affects users of Clipchamp.

items.title: Microsoft Intune: macOS Platform SSO Support

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Communication Compliance - Ability to exclude spam and bulk emails

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Ground prompts using SharePoint Sites

items.ai_summary: Microsoft Copilot will allow users to save audio overviews from Copilot Notebooks directly to OneDrive for sharing. This change affects users of Copilot Notebooks.

items.ai_summary: Microsoft Purview compliance portal will enable scoping of classification and activities for users on Windows devices. This impacts compliance administrators managing data loss prevention.

items.ai_summary: A new role has been added in Microsoft Purview for downloading original evidence files from endpoints. This affects users with specific compliance roles.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Advanced label-based protection for non-Office/PDF files with the Microsoft Purview Information Protection Client
items.ai_summary: Advanced label-based protection will be available for non-Office/PDF files using the Microsoft Purview Information Protection Client. This affects users handling sensitive non-Office files.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Learning - Academy auto-save and drafting functionality
items.ai_summary: Viva Learning will now automatically save changes made to learning paths in the background, affecting users who create or edit learning content.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Ability to export policy settings

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Pulse - Pulse series for continuous feedback supporting AI transformations and change management
items.ai_summary: New templates in Viva Pulse will support continuous feedback for change management scenarios. This impacts HR and management roles focused on employee feedback.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Engage – Engage content surfacing in Copilot results

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Collaborative Notes and Loop Components for Microsoft 365 GCC High and DoD

items.title: Outlook: Use Copilot to select and rewrite specific pieces of text in an email in classic Outlook for Windows
items.ai_summary: In classic Outlook for Windows, users can now use Copilot to select and rewrite specific text in emails. This feature affects users composing emails.

items.title: Outlook: Summarize email attachments with Copilot in classic Outlook for Windows
items.ai_summary: Copilot can now summarize PDF, Word, and PowerPoint attachments in classic Outlook for Windows. This feature affects users who receive these types of attachments.

items.title: Microsoft 365 app: Microsoft Places - Graph API support for directory objects
