items.ai_summary: A glossary feature will be added to SharePoint's document translation service, improving translation accuracy and consistency. This change affects users relying on translated documents.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Updates to Copilot Chat response output
items.ai_summary: Updates to Copilot Chat will enhance interaction with Microsoft Graph content, featuring bolder references and a new action bar. This affects users of Copilot Chat.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Read aloud available in Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat
items.ai_summary: Copilot Chat will now support a read aloud feature, allowing users to listen to responses as audio. This impacts users of Copilot Chat.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Dictate your prompts in Copilot Chat
items.ai_summary: Users can now dictate prompts in Copilot Chat using a dictation button. This feature affects users interacting with Copilot Chat.

items.title: Microsoft Clipchamp: Unified video branded start page
items.ai_summary: Clipchamp will have a unified start page that combines video creation, consumption, and discovery. This change affects all Clipchamp users.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Microsoft Purview Data Security Posture Management for AI- additional Microsoft Copilot integrations
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Purview Data Security Posture Management for AI will integrate with Fabric Copilot and Security Copilot. This affects users utilizing these AI tools.

items.title: Microsoft Purview Information Protection: Tracking and Revocation in Compliance Portal
items.ai_summary: Users can now track access attempts to their sensitivity labeled and encrypted Office files and revoke access through the Microsoft Purview compliance portal. This affects users managing sensitive documents.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Glint - User Schema Enhancements- Create and Edit Hierarchies
items.ai_summary: Viva Glint admins can create and edit user hierarchies directly within the platform, simplifying data management.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Updated UI for Microsoft 365 Copilot App
items.ai_summary: The Microsoft 365 Copilot app has an updated user interface for easier access to AI tools, chat, and content creation.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot in Excel with Python for GCC
items.ai_summary: Copilot in Excel for GCC now includes Python support for advanced data analysis and visualizations.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Data Security Posture Management for AI
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Purview AI Hub is now called Data Security Posture Management for AI, providing insights into generative AI activity and sensitive data.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: New email indicators to alert on exfiltration of business sensitive data to free public
items.ai_summary: New email indicators in Insider Risk Management alert admins when sensitive data is sent to free public domains or personal accounts.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Data Loss Prevention - New predicate in Email DLP - Detect number of domains/Recipients
items.ai_summary: A new feature in Email DLP allows organizations to set alerts based on the number of recipients or domains in outgoing emails.

items.title: OneDrive: Sync admin reports - bulk data export
items.ai_summary: OneDrive now supports bulk export of sync admin reports, including device status and sync errors.

items.title: Word: Automatic summary of documents on file-open in Word
items.ai_summary: Word will now generate an automatic summary when a document is opened, allowing users to hide it or ask questions via Copilot. This change affects all Word users.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365) Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat general availability for GCC
items.ai_summary: Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat is now available for GCC users without needing a Copilot license, ensuring secure AI chat for enterprise data. This affects Microsoft 365 GCC users.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Endpoint Data Loss Prevention - Enhanced content extraction and file type coverage for DLP on Windows devices
items.ai_summary: Data Loss Prevention policies in Microsoft Purview will expand file type coverage on Windows devices from about 40 to over 100 types. This impacts users managing sensitive content on endpoints.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Teams Meeting Audit Events in GCC
items.ai_summary: Teams Meeting Audit Events will be available in GCC, providing detailed insights into meeting activities for administrators. This impacts Teams administrators in GCC.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot can generate an audio overview of a notebook
items.ai_summary: Microsoft Copilot can now generate an audio overview of notebook files, enhancing accessibility for users. This feature currently supports English only.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Data Security Posture Management for AI - Data Assessments
items.ai_summary: Admins can perform data assessments in Microsoft Purview for AI, reviewing data sensitivity and user access to improve data security. This affects compliance and security administrators.

items.title: Outlook: Move to in the pop-out ribbon in New Outlook and Outlook for Web
items.ai_summary: The 'Move To' option is now available in the pop-out ribbon in New Outlook and Outlook for Web, simplifying email organization. This affects all Outlook users.

items.title: Outlook: Move to in the pop-out ribbon in New Outlook and Outlook for Web
items.ai_summary: The 'Move To' option is now available in the pop-out ribbon in New Outlook and Outlook for Web, simplifying email organization. This affects all Outlook users.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot Extensibility - Admins can manage Copilot extensibility under Copilot tab in Microsoft 365 admin center
items.ai_summary: Admins can now manage Copilot extensibility options, including agent management, under the Copilot tab in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Data Loss Prevention: Enrich the details of the auto forwarded emails in the Exchange DLP
items.ai_summary: Exchange DLP will provide more detailed information for auto forwarded emails, helping admins trace the origin and recipient accurately.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Endpoint Data Loss Prevention - Paste to Browser prevention support on macOS device with endpoint DLP
items.ai_summary: Endpoint Data Loss Prevention now prevents users on macOS from pasting sensitive content into web browsers like Edge and Safari.
